arts.ttl: Arsenal handed new Jurrien Timber injury update as best-case Mikel Arteta scenario emerges
arts.sum: Martin Odegaard and Ben White are also dealing with injuries, though the latter, alongside Timber, could be in line to return against Southampton based on Arteta's most recent comments . Mikel Arteta has received a new Jurrien Timber injury update which could be great news for Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta has already revealed Arsenal plan for Mikel Merino as Southampton decision looms
arts.sum: Mikel Merino's arrival at Arsenal certainly took a long time, so it was fitting that his debut did too. On Tuesday night though, we finally got to see what all those qualities would look like.

arts.ttl: Antonio Rudiger sends dream William Saliba transfer message amid Real Madrid links
arts.sum: When asked what defender he would sign for Real Madrid, Rudiger replied: "I say William Saliba . As a reward for another excellent campaign, Saliba was named in the PFA Premier League Team of the Year for the second successive season.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta hints at new Arsenal priority for Edu as huge transfer statement made
arts.sum: Injuries have plagued the midfielder in recent years but he has started every Premier League game this season, which shows Arteta is clearly still of the belief he is an important player. "Very important as he is a massive player for us," Arteta replied when asked about Partey's performance levels this season.

arts.ttl: Is Ben White fit to start for Arsenal vs Southampton? Injury latest and FPL update
arts.sum: Arsenal defender Ben White faces a race against time to be fit for the Premier League match against Southampton this weekend. Mikel Arteta ’s side have their third home game in a week on Saturday when they take on newly-promoted Southampton at the Emirates Stadium (3pm kick-off).

arts.ttl: Arsenal injury news and return dates vs Southampton
arts.sum: With that said, football.london has taken a look at the latest Arsenal injury updates along with some potential return dates. Ben White and Martin Odegaard are the marquee absentees with Jurrien Timber as a major doubt for Saturday's clash after being subbed off in the 2-0 win against PSG .

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Southampton Premier League score predicted with shock result
arts.sum: Arsenal were promising in the opening stages at the Emirates Stadium, with Saka striking the far post before Havertz tested Aaron Ramsdale from close range as the Gunners looked for the opener. We predict that Arsenal could set up in a 4-4-2 formation, with their line-up as follows: Raya; Calafiori, Saliba, Gabriel, Kiwior; Saka, Partey, Rice, Martinelli; Trossard, Havertz.

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard delivers huge injury update and details return timeline at Arsenal
arts.sum: Commenting in this weekend’s Arsenal matchday programme ahead of the visit of Southampton, Odegaard said: “I just wanted to start with the latest on my injury and rehab. Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard says his ankle injury does not seem as bad as first feared and hopes to be back in action before long with recovery going “really good”.

arts.ttl: Arsenal are doing one thing very differently to Man City and Liverpool in Premier League title race
arts.sum: According to stats revealed by fbRef.com, Arsenal keeper David Raya sends goal-kicks long more than any other goalkeeper in the Premier League. In six matches so far, Raya has kicked the ball long 79.5% of the time, which seems incredible to say for a top team.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta calls up 19-year-old midfielder with 'much energy' to Arsenal training, Declan Rice called him his 'bro'
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has been putting his players through their paces ahead of their last game before the international break. The Gunners will hope...
